findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Link filter allows javascript: URIs
 * @description The LinkFilter may not properly validate URL schemes, allowing javascript: URIs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xss-link-filter-xwiki
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

from Class c, Method m
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html.filter", "LinkFilter")
  and m.getDeclaringType() = c
select m, "LinkFilter method: " + m.getName()
findings.hypothesis: LinkFilter may not properly block javascript: or data: URIs in href/src attributes

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name LinkFilter URL scheme validation
 * @description Examining how LinkFilter validates URL schemes for XSS prevention
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/link-filter-scheme-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Look at string literals and comparisons in LinkFilter to understand what schemes are blocked
from Class c, StringLiteral sl
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html.filter", "LinkFilter")
  and sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
select sl, "LinkFilter string literal: " + sl.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: LinkFilter may have incomplete scheme validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SecureHTMLElementSanitizer regex patterns for URL schemes
 * @description Examining the URL scheme regex pattern used to block dangerous protocols
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-url-regex
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Find all string literals in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer related to regex/URL filtering
from Class c, StringLiteral sl, int line
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SecureHTMLElementSanitizer")
  and sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
  and line = sl.getLocation().getStartLine()
  and line >= 60 and line <= 130
select sl, "Line " + line + ": " + sl.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: Regex pattern for blocking dangerous URL schemes may have bypass vectors

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SanitizerFilter allowed attributes
 * @description Examining what attributes are allowed in SanitizerFilter
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sanitizer-filter-attrs
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Look at string literals in SanitizerFilter to understand what's allowed
from Class c, StringLiteral sl
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html.filter", "SanitizerFilter")
  and sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
select sl, "SanitizerFilter string literal at line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + sl.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: SanitizerFilter may have incomplete attribute filtering

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SecureHTMLElementSanitizer URL attribute check methods
 * @description Examining how URL attributes are validated in secure sanitizer
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-url-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Look at all methods and string constants in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer
from Class c, StringLiteral sl
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SecureHTMLElementSanitizer")
  and sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
  and sl.getLocation().getStartLine() >= 80
  and sl.getLocation().getStartLine() <= 145
select sl, "Line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + sl.getValue()

/**
 * @name SecureHTMLElementSanitizer field initialization with compile
 * @description Find Pattern.compile calls with the dangerous URL regex
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-pattern-compile
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Find Pattern.compile calls in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer
from MethodCall mc, StringLiteral sl
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("compile")
  and mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.regex", "Pattern")
  and mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SecureHTMLElementSanitizer")
  and sl.getParent*() = mc
select mc, "Pattern.compile at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " with: " + sl.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: The dangerous URL pattern regex ^(?:\w+script|data): may not block vbscript: since vbscript starts with non-word chars... actually vbscript is all word chars - but checking if CASE_INSENSITIVE flag is missing

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SecureHTMLElementSanitizer - allowUnknownProtocols usage and data attribute regex flaw
 * @description Analyze how allowUnknownProtocols bypasses URL validation and check data-attr regex
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-allow-unknown-protocols
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Find uses of allowUnknownProtocols in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("isAllowUnknownProtocols")
  or mc.getMethod().hasName("getAllowedUriRegexp")
  or mc.getMethod().hasName("getExtraDataUriTags")
  or mc.getMethod().hasName("getExtraAllowedTags")
  or mc.getMethod().hasName("getExtraAllowedAttributes")
select mc, "Configuration access at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName() + 
  ": " + mc.getMethod().getName()
findings.hypothesis: allowUnknownProtocols setting can bypass URL validation entirely, and extraDataUriTags can expand dangerous data URI support

message.text: Configuration access at line 158 in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer: getAllowedUriRegexp
Configuration access at line 151 in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer: getExtraAllowedTags
Configuration access at line 152 in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer: getExtraAllowedAttributes
Configuration access at line 154 in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer: getExtraDataUriTags
Configuration access at line 155 in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer: isAllowUnknownProtocols

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Broken regex patterns in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer
 * @description Identifies flawed regex patterns for attribute name validation that may allow XSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-broken-regex-v2
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("compile")
  and mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.util.regex", "Pattern")
  and mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SecureHTMLElementSanitizer")
select mc, "Pattern.compile at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Broken regex patterns for data- and aria- attribute validation in SecureHTMLElementSanitizer

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SecureHTMLElementSanitizer - configurable URI regexp and data-attr regex flaw
 * @description Confirm the configurable URI allowlist and broken data-attr regex pattern
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/secure-sanitizer-config-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Find the isAttributeAllowed method and its logic around data- attribute pattern matching
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SecureHTMLElementSanitizer")
  and m.hasName("isAttributeAllowed")
  and mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "isAttributeAllowed calls: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + 
  " on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() +
  " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: isAttributeAllowed logic and how data-attribute pattern matching works

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name SVGDefinitions all string literals
 * @description Check all SVG elements and attributes defined
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/svg-definitions-all
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

from Class c, Field f
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "SVGDefinitions")
  and f.getDeclaringType() = c
select f, "SVGDefinitions field: " + f.getName() + " type: " + f.getType().getName()

/**
 * @name EscapeTool methods
 * @description Check EscapeTool methods for encoding completeness
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/escape-tool-methods
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */
import java

from Class c, Method m
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.velocity.tools", "EscapeTool")
  and m.getDeclaringType() = c
  and not m.hasName("<init>")
select m, "EscapeTool method: " + m.getName() + " at line " + m.getLocation().getStartLine()

/**
 * @name HTMLElementSanitizerConfiguration - allowed elements config
 * @description Check configuration for HTML element sanitizer  
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/sanitizer-config-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */
import java

// Find string literals in HTMLElementSanitizerConfiguration  
from Class c, StringLiteral sl
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.xml.internal.html", "HTMLElementSanitizerConfiguration")
  and sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
select sl, "HTMLElementSanitizerConfiguration line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": " + sl.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: HTMLElementSanitizerConfiguration may have gaps in element/attribute allowlists
